concepts.title: 🌸 Identity Bloom Fractals
concepts.name: Identity Bloom Fractals
concepts.what_it_is: Fractals that model identity as layered emergence—each iteration a self similar to but not identical with the last. The self blooms, spirals, mutates.
how_to_use: her face blossoms across dimensions—each a petal of her greater identity fractal
his emotions grow in fractal rings, repeating in new context every time
concepts.animation_behavior: Identity layers unfold one by one, emotions bloom outward, visuals pulse in self-similar growth ---

concepts.title: 🛠 Mythomechanical Feedback Systems
concepts.name: Mythomechanical Feedback Systems
concepts.what_it_is: Machines whose operation is tied to mythic resonance—ritual output feeds back into story input, cycling myth through mechanics.
how_to_use: she powers the device by re-enacting the founding myth
the engine hums only when believed in—it feeds on ritual and story
concepts.animation_behavior: Device reacts to story being told, components shift with narrative changes, feedback visuals ripple with symbolic charge ---

concepts.title: 🌀 Anomalous Glyph Drift
concepts.name: Anomalous Glyph Drift
concepts.what_it_is: The phenomenon where glyphs escape their intended meaning and begin drifting—accumulating unintended symbolic charge or behaving like sentient signs.
how_to_use: the glyphs have left the page—they orbit her, mutating beyond control
he chases the drift-signs, trying to trap the one that once meant home
concepts.animation_behavior: Glyphs detach and drift, symbols morph mid-air, meaning slides across forms as context shifts ---

concepts.title: 🔁 Recursive Echo Shrines
concepts.name: Recursive Echo Shrines
concepts.what_it_is: Sacred sites that remember every visitor—each return causes the shrine to echo back earlier presences, forming layers of spiritual recursion.
how_to_use: she sees herself kneeling there—again and again, across lives
his prayer is answered by versions of himself, echoing the same hope
concepts.animation_behavior: Figures overlay across time, visual loops replay past visits, shrine pulses with layered presence

concepts.title: 🩸 Sigil Bleed Phenomena
concepts.name: Sigil Bleed Phenomena
concepts.what_it_is: The symbolic leakage of high-charge glyphs—sigils that begin to seep from their boundaries, leaking intent or meaning into surrounding space.
how_to_use: her skin bore sigils that bled—intent dripping into the air like ink
his words triggered bleed—symbols spreading like contagion
concepts.animation_behavior: Sigils spread when touched or spoken, trails pulse and drip, environmental distortion near source ---

concepts.title: 🔄 Inverse Ritual Fields
concepts.name: Inverse Ritual Fields
concepts.what_it_is: Areas where rituals operate in reverse—where unmaking, forgetting, or *unspeaking* becomes the sacred act.
how_to_use: she walks backward through the ritual path—each step unwrites the prayer
his offering was silence—the god answered with void
concepts.animation_behavior: Symbols collapse inward, sound reverses, offerings unburn, light flows backward into the wick ---

concepts.title: 🌀 Hyper-Meaning Vortices
concepts.name: Hyper-Meaning Vortices
concepts.what_it_is: Concentrated nexuses of excessive symbolic charge—so overloaded with potential meaning they become incomprehensible or dangerous.
how_to_use: his mind brushed the vortex and came back mythic—but broken
she stood at the center where all metaphors meet—unable to move
concepts.animation_behavior: Text spirals inward, environment overloads with symbols, viewers glitch from exposure ---

concepts.title: 👻 Fractal Shame Ghosts
concepts.name: Fractal Shame Ghosts
concepts.what_it_is: Recursive emotional residues—ghosts generated from moments of personal failure or guilt, repeating and multiplying in fractal feedback.
how_to_use: each time he regrets, a new ghost spawns—until they fill the house
she’s haunted by self—past iterations layered in loops of shame
concepts.animation_behavior: Ghosts echo actions slightly behind, multiply on emotional triggers, scenes loop subtly with each iteration

concepts.title: 📡 Mythospheric Interference Waves
concepts.name: Mythospheric Interference Waves
concepts.what_it_is: Invisible psychic broadcast fields that carry mythic resonance—when overlapped or out of phase, they cause interference in symbolic or narrative clarity.
how_to_use: he enters an interference zone—myth overlaps with myth, reality flickers
her aura scrambles nearby stories—their archetypes tangle in distortion
concepts.animation_behavior: Overlap zones flicker, symbols lose clarity then snap back, characters phase into alternate myth roles ---

concepts.title: 🗂 Divine Recursion Indexers
concepts.name: Divine Recursion Indexers
concepts.what_it_is: Entities or constructs that track recursive myth cycles—indexing lifetimes, timelines, or deity loops across fractal causality.
how_to_use: the indexer flips her soul open like a folder—cataloging each version of herself
he is the librarian of all recursions—every god-loop filed by glyph and grief
concepts.animation_behavior: Scrolls unfold with layered timelines, glyph indexes sync with viewer identity, memory scenes activate by touch ---

concepts.title: 📐 Intentionality Geometry
concepts.name: Intentionality Geometry
concepts.what_it_is: Geometries shaped entirely by will—structures that respond to intent alone, forming or distorting in response to unspoken desire.
how_to_use: his thoughts realign the temple—geometry folds into longing
she breathes calm and the walls stabilize—the triangle accepts peace
concepts.animation_behavior: Structures ripple with emotion, sharp angles soften with intent, space reshapes on presence alone ---

concepts.title: 🧬 Parasite Sigils
concepts.name: Parasite Sigils
concepts.what_it_is: Symbols that attach and feed on energy—parasitic glyphs that infect objects, thoughts, or people, slowly draining or altering meaning.
how_to_use: she wears the sigil unknowingly—it feeds on attention, warping her words
he scratches at the glyph—each thought makes it grow stronger
concepts.animation_behavior: Glyphs twitch with stimuli, grow when noticed, infect nearby elements, pulse in sync with host thought

concepts.title: 🧠 Mnemonic Implosion Fields
concepts.name: Mnemonic Implosion Fields
concepts.what_it_is: Zones where memory cannot survive—cognitive black holes that implode recollection, rendering events unknowable once entered.
how_to_use: she steps into the implosion field—her name unravels inside her
they speak around it—the thing no one remembers doing
concepts.animation_behavior: Visuals fade and flicker at edges, names lose sound, viewers forget what they saw moments before ---

concepts.title: 🌈 Identity Refraction Cores
concepts.name: Identity Refraction Cores
concepts.what_it_is: Crystalline structures that split and reflect identity into multiple selves—each angle a unique but related version of the original.
how_to_use: she looks into the core—twelve versions of her walk away
his identity diffracts—becoming roles he never chose
concepts.animation_behavior: Character duplicates into paths, identity shifts by viewing angle, mirrored motions stagger like light delay ---

concepts.title: ♻️ Entropy-Binding Coils
concepts.name: Entropy-Binding Coils
concepts.what_it_is: Fractal coils or constructs that capture and stabilize chaos—binding entropy into usable energy or structure without collapse.
how_to_use: her body is wrapped in entropy coils—they pulse to keep her stable
the shrine hums—chaos neatly coiled beneath the altar
concepts.animation_behavior: Coils pulse to contain chaos bursts, fractal spins tighten when threat increases, visual oscillation syncs with entropy input ---

concepts.title: 🧱 Anti-Memory Architecture
concepts.name: Anti-Memory Architecture
concepts.what_it_is: Structures designed to eliminate memory—buildings that induce forgetfulness, rooms that erase reason for entering.
how_to_use: he lives in a forgetting house—each day he rediscovers his room
her footsteps echo in unremembered halls—intent wiped at the threshold
concepts.animation_behavior: Paths reconfigure after use, rooms forget the viewer, visual context strips away on entry
